seo.defaultTitle: SkyRH — Multi-country payroll & HRIS, compliant in every country
seo.description: Multi-country payroll and social-fund filings, compliant in every country — OHADA included. SkyRH unifies payroll, social filings and the whole HR cycle on one platform.

hero.title: Multi-country payroll, compliant in every country — OHADA included.
hero.lead: SkyRH unifies payroll, social-fund filings and the whole HR cycle on one platform, with rules maintained country by country. Coverage keeps expanding: where others stop at Europe, we go all the way to OHADA. Built for organizations that operate across borders.

homeValue.title: The HRIS with payroll at its core, not as an add-on
homeValue.lead: Most HRIS bolt payroll on. SkyRH starts from payroll and social-fund filings — the hardest, most regulated part — and brings the rest of the HR cycle onto the same platform.

blocks.title: Compliant, country by country
blocks.desc: A rules engine maintained and checked by parity tests, extended to new countries continuously.

blocks.title: Social filings included
blocks.desc: Registrations, contributions and filings to social funds (CNPS, CNSS, URSSAF…) in the same tool as payroll — not a separate module.

blocks.title: The whole HR cycle, not silos
blocks.desc: Hiring, leave, attendance, performance and a self-service portal — on the same platform as payroll, sharing the same data.

modulesPage.heading: Modules built for HR teams
modulesPage.sub: Modular by design — start with what you need, add the rest as you grow.
modulesPage.ctaLead: Pick your modules, add the rest as you grow. 14-day trial, no card.

pricingPage.heading: Simple pricing, per employee
pricingPage.sub: Every plan includes a 14-day trial. Billed per active employee, prorated.
pricingPage.selectModules: Pick the modules you need — required dependencies are added automatically.

faq.a: You're billed monthly for active employees only, prorated — add or remove people anytime and the next invoice adjusts automatically.

faq.q: Can I change plan at any time?
faq.a: Yes. Upgrade, downgrade or add modules whenever you like; changes take effect on the next cycle, with no penalty.

faq.q: Does the free trial need a card?
faq.a: No. The 14-day trial needs no payment method — you only enter billing details if you decide to subscribe.
Yes. Country rules — contributions, tax bands, statutory reports — are built into every paid plan and kept up to date.

legalPage.draft: Draft — to be finalized with legal counsel before launch.
legalPage.body: This page is a placeholder. The final version will be published here before launch. For any question in the meantime, please reach out via the contact page.

terms.p: These terms govern access to and use of the SkyRH platform (SaaS HR and payroll management) by the customer and the users it authorizes.
The customer is responsible for keeping its credentials confidential and for the actions taken from its workspace. Access is per-user and limited by each user's assigned rights.
The service is billed per active employee according to the chosen plan, prorated and in the selected currency. Non-payment may lead to module suspension and then account closure.
SkyRH uses reasonable efforts to keep the service available, without guaranteeing uninterrupted access. Support is provided at the level set by the subscribed plan.
The processing of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy. The customer remains the data controller for its own employees' data.
The customer may request account closure from its workspace. Access is kept until the end of the current period, after which data is erased in line with the retention policy.
These terms are governed by the law of SkyRH's place of establishment, and any dispute falls under the competent courts of that jurisdiction.

privacy.p: Account data (identity, email, company), service usage data and, on the customer's behalf, the HR and payroll data of its employees.
Providing and improving the service, billing, support and meeting legal obligations. Legal bases: performance of the contract, legitimate interest and legal obligations.
Data is kept for the duration of the contractual relationship, then for a limited retention period, before erasure or anonymization.
Processors (hosting, payment, email) may process data on our behalf under compliant agreements ensuring an adequate level of protection.
Under the GDPR and applicable laws, you have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection.
To exercise your rights or for any question about your personal data, write to privacy@skyrh.com.

cookies.p: A cookie is a small file placed on your device to let the site work and, where relevant, to measure how it is used.
Strictly necessary cookies (session, security, language and currency preferences) and, subject to your consent, audience-measurement cookies.
Non-essential cookies are only set with your consent, which you can withdraw at any time from your browser settings.

security.p: Data is hosted on secure infrastructure. Traffic is encrypted in transit (TLS) and sensitive secrets are protected at rest.
Access is governed by roles (RBAC) and isolated per company (multi-tenant). Sensitive actions are recorded in an audit log.
Regular backups are taken, and restore and business-continuity procedures are maintained.
In the event of a data breach, a notification procedure compliant with applicable legal obligations is applied.

incidents.title: Elevated latency on email notifications
incidents.body: A traffic spike slowed email delivery during the morning. Capacity scaled up and the queue drained.

incidents.title: Scheduled maintenance — payroll engine
incidents.body: A calculation-engine update was rolled out outside business hours. No user-facing downtime.

incidents.title: Intermittent API errors
incidents.body: A deployment caused occasional 5xx errors. Rolled back and the fix was redeployed.

platformPage.engineTitle: The engine that turns hours of payroll into minutes

engine.title: Massively parallel compute
engine.desc: Thousands of payslips processed at once, instead of a file read line by line.

engine.title: Real-time recompute
engine.desc: Change a bonus, a rate or a variable: everything recomputes instantly, without re-running the cycle.

engine.title: Linear scalability
engine.desc: From 10 to 100,000 employees, performance keeps up — no slowdown under load.

engine.title: Reproducible results
engine.desc: Every close is deterministic, traceable and auditable to the cent.

platformPage.engineLead: At the heart of SkyRH, SkyEngine computes your payroll in parallel rather than line by line. The result: near-instant closes, real-time recompute and the same reliability whether you pay 10 or 100,000 people.
platformPage.modesHeading: The same product, where your data must live

trustPage.title: Security, privacy and compliance at SkyRH
trustPage.lead: Payroll and HR data is sensitive. Here's how we protect it, how we handle privacy, and where to reach us for anything security-related.

pillars.title: Encryption
pillars.desc: Traffic is encrypted in transit (TLS) and sensitive secrets are protected at rest.

pillars.title: Tenant isolation
pillars.desc: A multi-tenant architecture keeps each company's data strictly separated from the others.

pillars.title: Access control
pillars.desc: Role-based access control (RBAC) governs who can see and do what, down to each workspace.

pillars.title: Availability
pillars.desc: We run the service to be reliable and transparent about its status.

trustPage.availabilityNote: Follow real-time service status on our
trustPage.privacyBody: We build with privacy by design: analytics run under GDPR-compliant consent (cookieless until you accept), personal data is processed only to deliver the service, and you stay in control of your data. The full details are in our privacy policy.
trustPage.complianceLead: The specifics below depend on your plan and region — contact us for the details that apply to your organization.
trustPage.draft: TO VALIDATE before publishing: fill in the real facts (hosting provider & region, sub-processor list, ISO 27001 / SOC 2 certification status, DPA link). This reminder only shows in development.

complianceItems.title: Data residency
complianceItems.desc: Your data is hosted on secure infrastructure. Contact us to confirm the hosting region that applies to your account.

complianceItems.title: Sub-processors
complianceItems.desc: We rely on a limited set of vetted processors (hosting, payment, email) under compliant agreements. The current list is available on request.

complianceItems.title: Certifications
complianceItems.desc: Our compliance program improves continuously. Contact us for the current status of our audits and certifications.

complianceItems.title: Data Processing Agreement
complianceItems.desc: A GDPR Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available on request for customers who need one.

trustPage.disclosureBody: Found a security issue? We want to hear from you. Reach our team and we'll work with you to investigate and fix it.

comparePage.hubTitle: SkyRH compared to other HR & payroll tools
comparePage.hubLead: Comparing HRIS platforms? Most are excellent in Europe and stop at its border. SkyRH runs payroll and social-fund filings beyond it — all the way to OHADA frameworks — on one platform.
comparePage.draft: To validate before publishing: fill in the verified competitor facts and confirm compliance with comparative-advertising rules before going to production. Competitor cells are placeholders until then.

why: Payroll compliant in every country — France, Europe and the OHADA zone — expanding continuously.
Social-fund filings in the same tool as payroll, not a separate module.
The whole HR cycle on one platform, sharing the same data.

geoPage.hubLead: Payroll compliant in every country you operate in — from the OHADA zone to Europe — run on one platform. Pick a country.

geoPage.lead: Payroll, contributions and filings to local social funds, on the same platform as your entities in other countries. One payroll, from HQ to subsidiary.
why: A localized payroll engine, kept up to date and checked by parity tests.
Registrations, contributions and social-fund filings in the same tool.
Your subsidiaries and HQ on one platform, sharing the same data.
